name: Exosister Asophiel
name_jp: エクソシスター・アソフィール
desc:
2 Level 4 monsters
Cannot be destroyed by the activated effects of monsters Special Summoned from the GY. You can only use each of the following effects of "Exosister Asophiel" once per turn. If this card is Xyz Summoned using an "Exosister" monster as material: Neither player can activate card effects in the GY this turn. You can detach 1 material from this card, then target 1 monster your opponent controls; return it to the hand.
mnst_eff:
2 Level 4 monsters
Cannot be destroyed by the activated effects of monsters Special Summoned from the GY. You can only use each of the following effects of "Exosister Asophiel" once per turn. If this card is Xyz Summoned using an "Exosister" monster as material: Neither player can activate card effects in the GY this turn. You can detach 1 material from this card, then target 1 monster your opponent controls; return it to the hand.
eff:
2 Level 4 monsters
Cannot be destroyed by the activated effects of monsters Special Summoned from the GY. You can only use each of the following effects of "Exosister Asophiel" once per turn. If this card is Xyz Summoned using an "Exosister" monster as material: Neither player can activate card effects in the GY this turn. You can detach 1 material from this card, then target 1 monster your opponent controls; return it to the hand.

sets.set: 25th Anniversary Tin: Dueling Heroes Mega Pack

action: Applies effects if Xyz Summoned using specific Xyz Material
Returns from your opponent's field to your opponent's hand
mst: Cannot be destroyed by card effects
Prevents activation of your Effect Monsters
Prevents activation of your Spell Cards
Prevents activation of your Trap Cards
Prevents activation of your opponent's Effect Monsters
Prevents activation of your opponent's Spell Cards
Prevents activation of your opponent's Trap Cards
summoning: Does not require specific Xyz Materials
